episodes.title: Sarah Ferguson Loses Freedom of the City of York over Epstein links
episodes.description:
Sarah Ferguson, former Duchess of York, has lost her honorary Freedom of the City of York over her links to Jeffrey Epstein. It was unanimously voted by Councillors in York that Ferguson should lose her title. The title of Freedom of the City is the highest commendation given by the City of York Council, recognising important service by royalty, local residents and notable figures.  

Her former husband Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor had this honour removed in 2022. 

This comes after Ferguson was stripped of the title Duchess of York in October 2025. The recent removal comes after the former Duchess’ connection to the convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. Since the publication of the Epstein files, six companies linked to Ferguson are being wound down. This includes Sarah’s Trust, a charity founded by Ferguson, which has announced its closure “for the foreseeable future.” 

The honour of Freedom of the City of York was given as a wedding present from York to Ferguson and Mountbatten-Windsor in 1987 during a visit. 

Mountbatten-Windsor was the first person to ever lose the title. 

Ferguson is mentioned numerous times among the millions of documents released by the US Department of Justice as part of the Epstein files.  

This video uses AI narration.
